name: Clazakizumab reduced IL-6-linked biomarkers in dialysis patients
summary: A second IL-6 ligand inhibitor supports biomarker modulation while surfacing dose-related safety caution.
statement: In maintenance dialysis patients with elevated hsCRP, clazakizumab reduced hsCRP and related inflammatory biomarkers compared with placebo.
population_or_model: Adults receiving maintenance dialysis with cardiovascular disease and/or diabetes and hsCRP of at least 2 mg/L
quantitative_note: Relative hsCRP reductions versus placebo at week 12 were 86%, 90%, and 92% for 2.5 mg, 5 mg, and 10 mg clazakizumab.
caveats: The trial was biomarker-focused and did not establish cardiovascular event reduction.
The dialysis population is high-risk and not representative of broad preventive aging use.
Serious infections were numerically more frequent in the 10 mg clazakizumab group.
